nasb.text: I will go down with you to Egypt, and I will also surely bring you up again; and Joseph will close your eyes.”

esv.text: I myself will go down with you to Egypt, and I will also bring you up again, and Joseph’s hand shall close your eyes.”

cnv.text: 我要親自與你一同下到埃及去，也必把你帶上來。約瑟要親手合上你的眼給你送終。”

ccb.text: 我必跟你一起下到埃及，也必带领你回来，约瑟必为你送终。”

csbs.text: 我要亲自与你一同下埃及去，也必定把你带上来。约瑟要亲手合上你的眼。”
